title: postapiauthcallbackcredentialswithvalidcredentials
description: Verify that POST /api/auth/callback/credentials with valid credentials returns 200 with authenticated session or JWT and allows access to protected routes with authenticated user context.

title: postapiauthcallbackcredentialswithinvalidcredentials
description: Verify that POST /api/auth/callback/credentials with invalid credentials returns 401 unauthorized and blocks access to protected routes.

title: postapiauthsignoutwithauthenticatedsession
description: Verify that POST /api/auth/signout with an authenticated session returns 200 confirmation, clears the session, and requires login for further protected requests.

title: getappactionsclienttsgetclientswithvalidauthandfilters
description: Verify that GET /app/actions/client.ts (getClients) with valid authentication and optional filters returns 200 with a list of clients displayed in the dashboard.

title: postappactionsclienttscreateclientwithvaliddata
description: Verify that POST /app/actions/client.ts (createClient) with valid client data returns 200 with the created client record available in listings and detail views.

title: getappactionsprojecttsgetprojectswithauthenticateduser
description: Verify that GET /app/actions/project.ts (getProjects) with authenticated user returns 200 with a collection of projects rendered in list or Kanban view.

title: postappactionsprojecttscreateprojectwithvaliddata
description: Verify that POST /app/actions/project.ts (createProject) with valid project and client data returns 200 with the created project appearing in project list and dashboard metrics.

title: getappactionskanbantsgetkanbanboardwithvalidprojectcontext
description: Verify that GET /app/actions/kanban.ts (getKanbanBoard) with valid project context returns 200 with lists, tasks, and card positions to render the Kanban board.

title: postappactionstimelogtslogtimewithvaliddata
description: Verify that POST /app/actions/timeLog.ts (logTime) with valid project, task, duration, and category returns 200 with saved time log included in timesheet and project metrics.

title: getappactionsfinancetsgetfinancialsummarywithauthenticateduserandvalidproject
description: Verify that GET /app/actions/finance.ts (getFinancialSummary) with authenticated user and valid project returns 200 with income, expenses, and cash flow data displayed in the finance dashboard.
